mapper.select: SELECT task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, require_doc, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason FROM task_instances WHERE due_date >= #{fromDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND due_date <= #{toDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND (status IS NULL OR upper(trim(status)) != 'DONE') ORDER BY due_date ASC

SELECT task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, require_doc, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason FROM task_instances WHERE due_date < #{today,jdbcType=DATE} AND (status IS NULL OR upper(trim(status)) != 'DONE') ORDER BY due_date ASC

SELECT task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, require_doc, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason FROM task_instances WHERE scheduled_start_at >= #{fromTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND scheduled_start_at <= #{toTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND (status IS NULL OR upper(trim(status)) != 'DONE') AND upper(coalesce(trim(schedule_status), 'UNSCHEDULED')) IN ('CONFIRMED', 'RESCHEDULED') ORDER BY scheduled_start_at ASC

SELECT task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, require_doc, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id, scheduled_start_at, scheduled_end_at, schedule_status, schedule_proposed_by, schedule_proposed_at, schedule_confirmed_by, schedule_confirmed_at, schedule_reschedule_reason, schedule_cancel_reason, schedule_no_show_reason FROM task_instances WHERE scheduled_start_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_start_at < #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND (status IS NULL OR upper(trim(status)) != 'DONE') AND upper(coalesce(trim(schedule_status), 'UNSCHEDULED')) IN ('CONFIRMED', 'RESCHEDULED') ORDER BY scheduled_start_at ASC
